recommendations.title: Johnny Tsunami
recommendations.overview: A Hawaiian teenage surfer shows off his skills when he takes to the snow slopes in Vermont.

recommendations.title: Timecop 2: The Berlin Decision

recommendations.title: Mom's Got a Date with a Vampire
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Horror
recommendations.overview: The Hansen kids are in a jam. Adam and his best friend Duffy have gotten their hands on some tickets for the Headless Horseman concert, and his sister Chelsea has a date with her dreamy boyfriend Peter. The only problem is they're both grounded. Chel

recommendations.title: The Godfather Part II
recommendations.overview: In the continuing saga of the Corleone crime family, a young Vito Corleone grows up in Sicily and in 1910s New York. In the 1950s, Michael Corleone attempts to expand the family business into Las Vegas, Hollywood and Cuba.

recommendations.title: Casino
recommendations.overview: In Las Vegas, two best friends--a casino executive and a Mafia enforcer--compete for a gambling empire and a fast-living, fast-loving socialite.

recommendations.title: Leaving Las Vegas
recommendations.overview: Ben Sanderson, an alcoholic Hollywood screenwriter who lost everything because of his drinking, arrives in Las Vegas to drink himself to death. There, he meets and forms an uneasy friendship and non-interference pact with prostitute Sera.

recommendations.title: Step Up All In
recommendations.overview: All-stars from previous installments convene in glittering Las Vegas, battling for a victory that could define their dreams and their careers.

recommendations.title: Killer Heat
recommendations.overview: An expat PI is hired to investigate a suspicious death in Crete, Greece, where jealousies run deep amongst the victim's powerful family.

recommendations.title: Black Moon Rising
recommendations.overview: An FBI free-lancer stashes a stolen Las Vegas-crime tape in a high-tech car stolen by someone else.

recommendations.title: Frank & Lola
recommendations.overview: A talented Las Vegas chef falls in love with an aspiring fashion designer but turns violently jealous when he realizes that she's hiding dark secrets.
